title: desmonema uviforme
intro: Desmonema uviforme, also known as Red Seaweed or Desmonema, is a species of box jellyfish found in tropical and subtropical waters, particularly in the Indo-Pacific region. It is not a plant but a marine invertebrate animal. However, I can provide information about another species, Gracilaria, which is a type of red algae often referred to as Gracilaria or Desmonema uviforme is sometimes confused with this.
